children.name: tdd-subagent
children.description: TDD subagent dispatch (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py) + forward-only TDD state machine (tdd-step.py) — absorbed tdd-state-machine at v4.0.0

children.name: tdd-state-machine
children.description: RETIRED — absorbed into tdd-subagent at v4.0.0 (TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-18); tombstone retained

children.name: rabbit-spec
children.description: RETIRED — surface absorbed into rabbit-feature as rabbit-feature-spec; tombstone retained per Inv 43

children.name: rabbit-file
children.description: RETIRED — superseded by rabbit-issue (GitHub Issues wrapper); tombstone retained per Inv 36(c) until directory removal

children.name: rabbit-feature
children.description: owns rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill; invokes tdd-subagent scripts

children.name: rabbit-issue
children.description: GitHub Issues wrapper for filing, listing, and lifecycle-managing bugs and enhancements via the gh CLI (successor to rabbit-file)

children.name: rabbit-config
children.description: configuration manager; hosts /rabbit-config skill; emits Stop/SessionStart alerts for active overrides

children.name: rabbit-meta
children.description: plugin-mode machinery for the per-project user-interfacer install — owns mode detection, CLAUDE.md/README.md generators, bootstrap helper

children.name: spec-seeder
children.description: read-only subagent that drafts initial spec.md sections for newly-declared user-project features (invoked by rabbit-feature-new in plugin mode)

nodes.name: bugs
nodes.description: centralized bug tracker (created on first bug filing)

nodes.name: backlogs
nodes.description: centralized backlog tracker (created on first backlog filing)
